top_signals.title: OpenAI Readies ‘Superapp’ Pivot Ahead of Planned IPO, FT Reports
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is readying a major platform overhaul ahead of its highly anticipated IPO later this year to better compete with rivals such as Anthropic, the Financial Times reported.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
